description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet themed after the film 'Blade Runner.' The front features a large, vertically oriented screen with a prominent marquee at the top displaying the 'Blade Runner' logo in red, accompanied by character artwork. The control panel is equipped with two red joysticks and multiple red buttons, suggesting support for two players. The left side panel is adorned with a dramatic sci-fi cityscape and a character in a helmet, while the right side panel showcases detailed portraits of two main characters from the film. The back of the cabinet is plain black, lacking any visible artwork or features. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood with a glossy laminate finish, accented by plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism.
description: A 'Blade Runner' themed upright arcade cabinet with vibrant side artwork, a large screen, and a red-accented dual-player control panel. The cabinet features a prominent marquee and detailed character graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, marquee with 'Blade Runner' logo, dual red joysticks, multiple red buttons, and a coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting a sci-fi cityscape and helmeted character artwork, with the control panel and joystick tops visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring detailed portraits of two main 'Blade Runner' characters and a partial view of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and multiple red buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a black and red color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Blade Runner' logo in red with character artwork and a dark, futuristic theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature detailed, full-color artwork depicting characters and scenes from 'Blade Runner,' with a sci-fi cityscape and dramatic portraits
